infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NetraOps uses the camera to capture incident report photos and location verification pings during your shift.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NetraOps uses your location to verify clock-ins, geofence patrols, and send location pings to your supervisor during active shifts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: NetraOps uses your location in the background during active shifts to send periodic location pings to your supervisor for safety monitoring.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NetraOps may save report photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: NetraOps saves photos you capture during incident reports.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: NetraOps uses Face ID for secure biometric login.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NetraOps does not record audio. This permission is required by the camera module.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: NetraOps monitors your location during shifts for geofence compliance.

plugins.cameraPermission: NetraOps uses the camera for clock-in verification and reports.
